730 GG0170I2_WLK_10_FEET_GOAL_CD GG0170I2_WLK_10_FEET_GOAL_CD GG0170I2 Walk 10 Feet Goal Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's goal once standing, to walk at least 10 feet in a room, corridor, or similar space by the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay.
